name: BENNOUNA LOURIDI JAAFAR
notes: Medical oncologist specializing in thoracic and digestive cancers at Hôpital Foch (Suresnes), previously at CHU Nantes

name: BESSE BENJAMIN
notes: Professor of Medical Oncology, Director of Clinical Research at Gustave Roussy (Villejuif); expert in thoracic cancers and thymic malignancies

name: CADRANEL JACQUES
notes: Professor of Pneumology at Sorbonne University, Head of Pneumology and Thoracic Oncology at Tenon Hospital (AP-HP, Paris)

name: DURUISSEAUX MICHAEL
notes: Assistant Professor and thoracic oncologist at Hospices Civils de Lyon (Louis Pradel Hospital), Medical Director of Joint Research Unit in Thoracic Oncology

name: GIRARD NICOLAS
notes: Professor of Respiratory Medicine, Head of Curie-Montsouris Thorax Institute at Institut Curie (Paris); expert in EGFR-mutant NSCLC and thymic tumors

name: MAZIERES JULIEN
notes: Professor of Respiratory Medicine and thoracic oncologist at CHU de Toulouse (Hôpital Larrey); researcher at Cancer Research Center of Toulouse (INSERM)

name: MORO SIBILOT DENIS
notes: Full Professor and Head of Thoracic Oncology Unit at CHU Grenoble Alpes; specialist in ALK/RET/EGFR-driven NSCLC and immunotherapy

name: PEROL MAURICE
notes: Head of Thoracic Oncology at Centre Léon Bérard (Lyon); prolific clinical trial investigator in advanced NSCLC

name: PLANCHARD DAVID
notes: Head of Thoracic Cancer Group at Gustave Roussy (Villejuif), Associate Professor at Université Paris-Saclay; leading expert in targeted therapies and biomarkers in lung cancer

name: PUJOL JEAN LOUIS
notes: Professor of Thoracic Oncology at CHU Montpellier (Arnaud de Villeneuve Hospital), INSERM U1194; Associate Editor (Europe) for Journal of Thoracic Oncology

name: ZALCMAN GERARD
notes: Full Professor of Pulmonology at Université Paris Cité, Head of Thoracic Oncology at Bichat-Claude Bernard Hospital (AP-HP); Medical Director of Cancer Institute AP-HP.Nord; IFCT Chair 2011

name: CHOUAID CHRISTOS
notes: Professor and Head of Pneumology and Thoracic Oncology at CHI Créteil (University Paris-East Créteil); coordinator of GFPC (French Thoracic Oncology Group)

name: CORTOT ALEXIS
notes: Professor and Head of Pulmonology and Thoracic Oncology at CHRU Lille (Hôpital Calmette); specialist in EGFR/MET resistance in NSCLC

name: MASCAUX CELINE
notes: Full Professor of Thoracic Oncology at CHRU de Strasbourg; member of IASLC Basic and Translational Science Committee; specialist in lung cancer biomarkers and squamous carcinogenesis

name: SCHERPEREEL ARNAUD
notes: Full Professor of Respiratory Medicine, Head of Heart/Lung/Vessels division at CHRU Lille; founder of NETMESO (French national mesothelioma network); President of iMig 2021-2025; 2019 ERS Gold Medal in Lung Cancer
